meaning: Network Operations Center,网络操作中心
examples: Bolivia, meanwhile, cannot decide whether it wants an NOC at all.
NO wonder then that Statoil, Norway's NOC, is generally thought to be the best of the lot.
The NOC can be alerted of system failures or see a shiny red error light on the Nagios Web interface.
Lockheed competes with Boeing and Northrop Grumman (NOC) on defense department contracts, among others.
On the other hand, the room was located next door to Stanford's network operations center (NOC).
